name: Ironclad Barber Co.
title: Barbershop
summary: A sharp, masculine single-page barbershop site — services and prices, barber profiles, a cuts gallery, and hours with a prominent book-now button.
setup_questions: What's the shop name and style (e.g. "old-school straight-razor, modern fades")?
What services and prices do you offer?
Who are your barbers and what's each one known for?
Address, hours, and your online booking link?
photo_terms: hot towel straight razor shave close up
sections: Hero with shop interior and 'Book a chair' CTA
Services and prices (cut, fade, beard trim, hot-towel shave, kids)
Meet the barbers with photos and specialties
Hours, walk-in policy, location and map
Footer with phone, booking link, and socials
based_on: A classic-meets-modern men's barbershop like Fellow Barber and Blind Barber — straight-razor fades, hot-towel shaves, named barbers with chairs, walk-ins plus a booking link.
